title: ranunculus extensus
intro: Ranunculus extensus, also known as the sharp-leaved buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus extensus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
